creator: robbelics@gmail.com
text:
I upgraded chromium to version 43 from 42. Chromium appears to load but then crashes with core dump. 

[17083:427848704:0528/204156:ERROR:resource_request_policy.cc(57)] Denying load of chrome-extension://apdfllckaahabafndbhieahigkjlhalf/page_embed_script.js from hosted app.

While it says "chrome extension" I turned off all my add-ons and it still crashes. However, it seems to occur while GMail was loading itself as Chrome was reloading my tabs after shutting it down. I had, perhaps eight tabs it was reloading and GMail was the first in the list but the icon in the tab was flickering as the browser went down.
